notes: All 15 declarations are theorems; no defs, instances, or sorries. The file is a purely structural reduction layer that transports the dual-additivity problem (picDual(α₁⊞α₂) = picDual α₁ + picDual α₂) through κ-conjugation to a class-group product identity, then unfolds to mk0/Ideal.map level (Phase 1.5) and ships the Dedekind fibre factorisation (Phase 5); no sorry, no maxHeartbeats, no proofs exceed 16 lines. Seven declarations have no proof-level callers within the file, serving as forward-looking infrastructure for a future Abel/theorem-of-the-square discharge.
